sizing_rule.note: Z-score converted to Normal Probability confidence limit drives position sizing magnitude. Confidence_Limit = Area_Under_Normal_Curve at Z standard deviations. Higher Z-score (further from mean) = higher confidence = larger position. Optimal_f values not specified by author.

source_rule_text: Convert Z score to confidence limit using the Normal Probability Function to determine the degree of certainty for position sizing decisions.
